```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from pathlib import Path

script_dir = Path(__file__).parent
derived_dir = script_dir / "../data/derived-data"

df_acs = pd.read_csv(derived_dir / "cleaned_acs_data.csv")

outliers = ['LOOP', 'FULLER PARK']
df_filtered = df_acs[~df_acs['Community Area'].str.upper().isin(outliers)].copy()

FINE = 100
df_filtered['Hourly_Wage'] = df_filtered['Est_Monthly_Income'] / 160
df_filtered['Hours_to_Pay'] = FINE / df_filtered['Hourly_Wage']

df_filtered = df_filtered.sort_values('Hours_to_Pay', ascending=False)
avg_hours = df_filtered['Hours_to_Pay'].mean()

bars = alt.Chart(df_filtered).mark_bar(color='steelblue').encode(
    x=alt.X('Community Area:N', sort='-y', title='Community Area'),
    y=alt.Y('Hours_to_Pay:Q', title='Hours of Work to Pay One Ticket ($100)'),
    color = alt.Color('Hours_to_Pay:Q'),
    tooltip=['Community Area', 'Hours_to_Pay']
)

rule = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({'avg': [avg_hours]})).mark_rule(color='red', strokeDash=[5, 5]).encode(
    y='avg:Q'
)

text = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({'avg': [avg_hours], 'label': [f'City Average: {avg_hours:.1f}h']})).mark_text(
    align='left',
    dx=5,
    dy=-5,
    color='red'
).encode(
    y='avg:Q',
    text='label:N'
)

chart = (bars + rule + text).properties(
    title='Time Tax: Labor Hours to Pay One Ticket by Community',
    width=800,
    height=400
).configure_axisX(
    labelAngle=90
)

chart
```
